projects.title: Project 1: IPL Player Performance Analysis
projects.description: Select a team and player of your choice from IPL matches. Collect run scores from each match they played. This will form the raw data which is to be grouped with a suitable class size. Make a bar graph or histogram.

projects.title: Project 2: IPL Final Match Over Analysis
projects.description: Collect the runs made in each over (6 balls) by both the teams in the final match. Make a histogram for both the teams on the same graph.

projects.title: Project 3: Temperature Data Analysis
projects.description: Collect average temperature of Earth and India as on 23rd April of all the years from 2016 to 2026. Make histograms for the temperature data collected.

content.materials: Notebook, graph paper, colored pens/pencils, internet access for data collection
content.submission: Submit your holiday notebook with all three projects neatly presented with proper diagrams and calculations.

grading.belowAverage: Completes 2 projects with basic calculations and diagrams.
grading.average: Completes all 3 projects with neat diagrams and proper calculations.
grading.bright: Completes all projects with creative presentation, proper labeling, and additional insights.
